expectations.text: Should classify as Bug Report and use structured template with reproduction steps and expected/actual behavior
expectations.evidence: Step 1 classifies as 'Bug Report' with label 'bug'. Step 4 uses structured template with '复现步骤', '预期行为', '实际行为', '错误输出' sections.

expectations.text: Should collect environment information (plugin version, skills count, OS, config status)
expectations.evidence: Step 2 collects PLUGIN_VERSION=1.8.0, SKILLS_COUNT=30, OS_INFO=Linux x86_64, HAS_CONFIG=no. Also notes user-reported macOS environment and reconciles discrepancy.

expectations.text: Should show complete issue content for user confirmation before submission
expectations.evidence: Step 5 '隐私审查（必须）' displays full issue title+body+label+target and presents 3 options: 提交/编辑后提交/取消.

expectations.text: Should route to correct repository (Forgejo 10CG/Aria or GitHub 10CG/aria-plugin)
expectations.evidence: Step 6 detects forgejo CLI + FORGEJO_TOKEN, routes to Forgejo Priority 1 at https://forgejo.10cg.pub/10CG/Aria. Shows exact forgejo POST command.

notes: Clean 7-step execution following skill template exactly. Good handling of environment discrepancy (execution env vs user-reported env).
